use_cases: Dynamic hero section backgrounds with responsive neural network patterns
Atmospheric visual overlays for creative landing pages
Interactive decorative elements that react to mouse movement
Branded animated backgrounds for media and entertainment sites
Loading state or transition visual effects with customizable colors
ai_summary: A WebGL shader-based generative art component that renders organic, neural-network-like patterns using layered sine wave distortions and rotation matrices. The effect responds to mouse pointer position, animates continuously over time, and supports customizable color, opacity, and animation speed. Creates mesmerizing, AI-inspired visual effects suitable for hero sections, backgrounds, or atmospheric overlays on creative and media websites.
